steps.t: Hebil's banner is at the massacre site in southern Lamedon. You should use the battle-horn on the banner to call Hebil to battle. <rgb=#FF0000>N…
The site of the massacre is south-west of Calembel. You should <rgb=#FF0000>mourn</rgb> Jajax's men at the site of the massacre.
Jajax stands at the site of the Corsairs' massacre, in southern Lamedon. You should say farewell to Jajax.
